office_does: The sheriff leads county law enforcement, emergency response, staffing, investigations, and the office budget.
race_blurb: Incumbent Darrin Wallace faces deputy and former hospital-board member Edward Welter.

candidates.summary: Wallace is the incumbent sheriff and former chief investigations deputy emphasizing law-enforcement tools, agency strategy, and safety.
highlights: Supports restoring law-enforcement tools and community safety [S3].

safety.basis: Restoring law-enforcement tools supplies a clear enforcement direction.

experience.basis: Incumbency and former investigations-command service provide an extensive record.

candidates.summary: Welter is a sheriff's deputy and former hospital-board member proposing more staffing, training, property-crime investigation, and engaged leadership.
highlights: Supports staffing increases and full property-crime investigation [S2].

safety.basis: Increased staffing and full property-crime investigation directly favor enforcement.

experience.basis: Deputy service and prior hospital-board experience provide a public record short of sheriff incumbency.
